name: starter
title: Starter pack
description: The generic vault skills every user gets: daily briefing, email drafting, preference capture, downloads filing, retrospectives, conflict scanning, and project scaffolding.
whenToOffer: Always — this is the default pack installed at INIT.

skills.name: email-drafter
skills.summary: Drafts client/prospect replies in your voice; never sends.

skills.name: morning-briefing
skills.summary: One-page daily brief from calendar + mail + memory.

skills.name: preferences-updater
skills.summary: Captures corrections and standing rules; proposes memory updates.

skills.name: downloads-filer
skills.summary: Sorts /inbox/downloads into the right project folder.

skills.name: session-retrospective
skills.summary: Scores the session and proposes improvements.

skills.name: conflict-scanner
skills.summary: Flags requests that contradict stored preferences or decisions.

skills.name: project-skeleton
skills.summary: Scaffolds a new /projects/<name>/ folder and registers it.

schedules.why: the day's read before you start
